violations.text: Wood is used in the construction of platform for counter oven in the front counter area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces observed with debris: 1.the shelves throughout establishment have an accumulation of food residue, and/or other debris. 2.chip racks observed with dust. 3.bread pans observed with food residue Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The floors (walk in cooler) and walls (kitchen area) accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
The insulation covering on the hot water tank is in poor repair, exposing the insulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
